name: rulefoundry-extractions
description: Business logic for the agentic enterprise.

interface.shortDescription: Business logic for the agentic enterprise.
interface.longDescription: Find permitted RuleFoundry Extractions, use finalized artifacts as cited source material, or—after confirming the exact topic, optional description, and participant—create a request for yourself or an external email. RuleFoundry sends the external notification automatically; Extraction sessions still happen in RuleFoundry.
defaultPrompt: Show the Extractions assigned to me.
Find completed Extractions I can use for this task.
Create an Extraction request for missing logic with me as the participant.
